adapterHints.cursor: - In repos with workspace harness: also read `.cursor/rules/` and `docs/specs/`.
adapterHints.codex: - In repos with workspace harness: also read `.codex/skills/sdd/` when present.
adapterHints.claude: - In repos with workspace harness: repo `AGENTS.md` wins over `CLAUDE.md` pointers.
adapterHints.opencode: - In repos with workspace harness: also read `.opencode/` SDD assets when present.
adapterHints.pi: - Skills load from `~/.agents/skills` (shared Agent Skills root). Teaching persona activates only via the managed section of `~/.pi/agent/AGENTS.md`.

adapterHints.cursor: - Configure Engram via `kairo components configure engram-memory` (official `engram setup cursor`).
adapterHints.codex: - Configure Engram via `kairo components configure engram-memory` (official `engram setup codex`).
adapterHints.claude: - Configure Engram via `kairo components configure engram-memory` (official `engram setup claude-code`).
adapterHints.opencode: - Configure Engram via `kairo components configure engram-memory` (official `engram setup opencode`).
adapterHints.pi: - Configure Engram via `kairo components configure engram-memory` (official `engram setup pi`). Evidence: `~/.pi/agent/settings.json` packages + `mcp.json` engram server. Restart Pi after setup; Kairo never runs `engram doctor`/`serve` or touches `engram.db`.

adapterHints.cursor: - Graphify CLI is not auto-installed; run `graphify update .` after code changes when graphify is in PATH.
adapterHints.codex: - Graphify CLI is not auto-installed; run `graphify update .` after code changes when graphify is in PATH.
adapterHints.claude: - Graphify CLI is not auto-installed; run `graphify update .` after code changes when graphify is in PATH.
adapterHints.opencode: - Graphify CLI is not auto-installed; run `graphify update .` after code changes when graphify is in PATH.
